creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
Updated japanese/chasen to the latest version 2.02.  Plus, made it
install Perl5 module `Text::ChaSen', which can be utilized by
japanese/namazu2.  (Namazu supports ChaSen as well as KAKASI)

Fix: 

/
                          /__  __
                         / )  )  ) )  /
Akinori -Aki- MUSHA aka / (_ /  ( (__(  <knu@idaemons.org>

"If you choose not to decide you still have made a choice."--PgqPeniAmQCRFN12utcTpp3TUp2E6BzWgA1k8VDq5Igl9jT9
Content-Type: text/plain; name="chasen.diff.gz"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="chasen.diff.gz"
